_doc: Hand-curated anchor set for the map-search calibration check.
`bots` is a stylistically-diverse roster intended to span the ability
range. `pairs` is a list of [winner, loser] dominance claims that
should hold on ANY reasonable map — these are bots that consistently
live near the top tier vs. consistently live near the bottom tier in
every saved league we have. A map that fails too many of these is
unlikely to be measuring 'good bot' the way we mean it.
Not a total order. Pairs are restricted to obvious cases — strong
vs. weak — so the calibration check has near-zero false positives.
Mid-tier bots (Aggressive, Spearhead, SlowAndSteady) are deliberately
absent from `pairs` because their order is map-dependent.
